citation.article_title: Re-evaluating old stellar populations

citation.journal_title: Monthly Notices of the Royal Astronomical Society

citation.author: Conroy
citation.unstructured_citation: Conroy, C., Gunn, J. E., & White, M. (2009). The propagation of uncertainties in stellar population synthesis modeling. I. The relevance of uncertain aspects of stellar evolution and the initial mass function to the derived physical properties of galaxies. The Astrophysical Journal, 699(1), 486–506. https://doi.org/10.1088/0004-637X/699/1/486
